title: 2Pcs Rubber Vinyl Ducks Bath Time Family Set, Bath Toys for Toddlers Soft Rubber Ducks Stocking Fillers, Water Fun Playing Toys for Kids Baby Bath Toys Pool Toys
features: Complete Bath Toy Set: The package includes 2 adorable vinyl ducks – one big (9 cm x 8 cm x 5.5 cm) and one small (5 cm x 5 cm x 4.5 cm). Perfect for toddler bath time, these cute family bath toys are designed for fun and engagement.

Safe and Non-Toxic Material: Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free rubber, these rubber ducks are safe for children. Made with non-toxic materials, they are durable, lightweight, and gentle on little hands, ensuring a safe and enjoyable bath time.

Float and Squeeze Fun: These bath ducks float on water, making them perfect for playful water activities. Both the mother and baby duck feature a squeeze function, helping toddlers develop coordination and imaginative skills while having fun in the bath.

Ideal for Toddlers: These small and easy-to-grasp bath toys are great for toddlers, providing endless entertainment while improving their fine motor skills. Great for use in the bath, pool, or any water play scenario, they add joy and excitement to bath time.

Perfect Gift for Baby and Toddler: These rubber duck toys make wonderful stocking fillers and gifts for babies and toddlers. Whether for a birthday, Christmas, or any other occasion, this cute and practical bath time toy set is a perfect gift choice for young children.
description: Product description THE DUCK FLOATS ARE SUITABLE FOR BABY SHOWER TOYS/BIRTHDAY GIFTS/PARTY SUPPLIES The rubber ducks are made of high-quality rubber, sturdy, not easy to fade when you play in the water or under the sun, lightweight and tiny, easy to carry everywhere. It is a cute bath toy for babies, with bright colors, soft touch and diverse styles, which can improve their sense ability and also can relief babies' fear of water. Bring a happy water experience. Enjoy your happy bathing moment with the kids, playing with the ducks. SPECIFICATIONS:- Material: Durable Rubber Big Duck Dimensions: 9cm x 8cm(LXW) Small Duck Dimensions: 5cm x 5cm(LXW) Pack Quantity: 2 Pieces Color: Yellow FEATURES:- High quality rubber material. Water squirt fun bath toys rubber floating bathroom toys set. Cute family bathtub toy set includes a mother and a baby squeeze. It will help in boosting toddlers’ coordination skills. Safe, Non-Toxic & BPA-Free. Made of Durable material. Lightweight, So that toddlers can hold & play easily while bathing. Easy to grasp for small hands. Can be used in the bathtub or in the pool. SATISFACTION GUARANTEED Your satisfaction is our first priority, customer service always stands by for you to provide 100% satisfied service.
